changelog: Fix: duplicate discovery shelf rows, star symbol ✦ consistency
changelog_zh: 修正：為你推薦重複顯示問題，星號符號 ✦ 統一

changelog: Fix: search works when signed in (addAuthSkip on SearchService)
changelog_zh: 修正：登入後搜尋功能恢復正常

changelog: QoS: playback-aware search throttling (3→1 concurrent during video)
changelog_zh: QoS：播放影片時自動降低背景搜尋併發

changelog: Background prefetch delayed 10s, search threads MIN_PRIORITY
changelog_zh: 背景預取延遲 10 秒，搜尋執行緒降低優先級

changelog: Purged all hardcoded years from 68 search queries across 39 files
changelog_zh: 清除 39 個檔案共 68 個搜尋查詢中的硬編碼年份

changelog: Anime Pool E: audited 117 queries, fixed 50 across 32 languages
changelog_zh: 動漫 Pool E：審查 117 個查詢，修正 32 種語言共 50 個

changelog: Anime Pool E across 45 languages
changelog_zh: 動漫 Pool E 45 種語言

changelog: Localized movie queries, anime Pool E, 5 content pools rotating
changelog_zh: 電影查詢本地化，動漫 Pool E，5 組查詢池輪換

changelog: Trending tab: fallback chain kworb → Charts → language discovery
Accept-Language header for localized movie/streaming titles
Audited 54 search queries across 38 languages
Ranking engine, YouTube Charts, duration badge, exploration pool
changelog_zh: 審查 38 種語言 54 個搜尋查詢
排名引擎、YouTube 排行榜、影片長度 badge、探索池

changelog: searchFresh(): THIS_WEEK + THIS_MONTH fallback everywhere
All search calls now use THIS_WEEK filter
Language discovery: stop word search, 15 language pools
THIS_WEEK filter triggers 新影片 badge on search results
Search filter THIS_MONTH for fresh content
Trending tab: kworb-only, removed fake search trending
Removed 爆紅/Viral shelves, replaced with better queries
Ranking engine, exploration pool, duration badge
YouTube Charts, progressive home loading, QR sign-in
kworb /player metadata, 48 language search queries
SplashActivity prewarm, parallel search
Initial fork from yuliskov/SmartTube
